violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
Handles for bar coolers observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
